title: Personal Memoirs of Ulysses S
author: Ulysses S. Grant
description: Personal Memoirs of U.S. Grant is a compelling and comprehensive autobiography written by Ulysses S. Grant, the 18th President of the United States and a celebrated military leader. In this remarkable memoir, Grant recounts his personal experiences and provides a firsthand account of some of the most significant events in American history, including the American Civil War.
